notes: The quiet one. Meditation on sustained effort without a goalpost. Reduced intensity throughout — this song is held breath, not shouting. The thesis IS the ending: 'Or maybe the surface was never the goal / And the deep is just where I go to feel whole.' That final couplet is the album's emotional crux. Bias slightly cyan — cool, deep, reflective.

chunks.note: And the deep doesn't ask, it just holds what it's got — refrain #1 pt1
I'm not swimming, I'm just learning to stop. — refrain #1 pt2, the admission
Treading water where the current runs still — hook
Too compelled to quit, too stubborn to kill. — hook payoff
too far down to kill — note the variation from 'stubborn'; deeper commitment
Or maybe the surface was never the goal — album thesis pt1
And the deep is just where I go to feel whole. — album thesis pt2, biggest moment of the album
